title: F.N.B. Corporation's Continued Strong Financial Performance Leads to an 8% Increase to the Quarterly Common Stock Cash Dividend and the Authorization of a New $250 Million Share Repurchase Program
author: Prnewswire
description: F.N.B. Corporation announced an 8% increase to its quarterly cash dividend to $0.13 per share and authorized a new $250 million share repurchase program, reflecting strong financial performance. The company has returned $2.3 billion to shareholders over nearly two decades while growing its balance sheet 477% and maintaining an industry-leading efficiency ratio.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company demonstrated strong financial performance with an 8% dividend increase, a new $250 million share repurchase authorization, record capital levels, and a track record of returning $2.3 billion to shareholders. Management highlighted sustained exceptional performance, industry-leading efficiency ratios, and outperformance of the KBW Regional Banking Index by over 200%.

title: F.N.B. Corporation Declares Cash Dividend of $0.12 on Common Stock
author: Prnewswire
description: F.N.B. Corporation announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.12 per share on its common stock, payable on March 16, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 2, 2026. The Pittsburgh-based diversified financial services company operates across seven states and the District of Columbia with over $50 billion in total assets.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company declared a consistent quarterly cash dividend of $0.12 per share, demonstrating financial stability and commitment to returning capital to shareholders. This regular dividend payment is a positive indicator of the company's profitability and confidence in its financial position.

title: F.N.B. Corporation Declares Cash Dividend of $0.12 on Common Stock
author: Prnewswire
description: F.N.B. Corporation announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.12 per share, payable on December 15, 2025, to shareholders of record as of December 1, 2025.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company declared a consistent cash dividend, indicating financial stability and commitment to shareholder returns. The bank has $50 billion in total assets and operates across seven states, suggesting a strong market presence.

title: F.N.B. Corporation Declares Cash Dividend of $0.12 on Common Stock
author: Prnewswire
description: F.N.B. Corporation announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.12 per share, payable on September 15, 2025, to shareholders of record as of September 2, 2025. The company is a diversified financial services organization operating across seven states with nearly $50 billion in total assets.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Positive sentiment due to consistent dividend declaration, strong financial position with $50 billion in assets, and broad market coverage across multiple states

title: F.n.b. Beats Q2 2025 EPS by 5.9%
author: Jesterai
description: Regional bank F.n.b. reported strong Q2 2025 financial results, exceeding analyst expectations with increased revenue, loan growth, and record fee income while maintaining robust capital metrics.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Exceeded earnings estimates, achieved record fee income, expanded net interest margin, grew loans and deposits by 3.7% and 7.3% respectively, maintained strong capital ratios, and continued strategic technology investments
